<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ use Symfony\Polyfill\Php85 as p; if (\PHP_VERSION_ID >= 80500) { return; } if (!function_exists('get_error_handler')) { function get_error_handler(): ?callable { return p\Php85::get_error_handler(); } } if (!function_exists('get_exception_handler')) { function get_exception_handler(): ?callable { return p\Php85::get_exception_handler(); } } if (!function_exists('array_first')) { function array_first(array $array) { return p\Php85::array_first($array); } } if (!function_exists('array_last')) { function array_last(array $array) { return p\Php85::array_last($array); } }
